mapper.sql: select m.id, m.card_no, m.name, m.phone, m.card_type_id, m.level_id, m.dept_id, m.valid_date, m.status, m.borrow_count_valid, m.current_points, coalesce(nullif(m.remark, ''), ac.remark) as remark, m.last_operator, m.source, m.sync_erp, m.created_at, m.updated_at, ct.type_name as card_type_name, d.dept_name from member m left join util_card_type ct on m.card_type_id = ct.id left join sys_dept d on m.dept_id = d.dept_id left join member_card ac on ac.member_id = m.id and ac.status = 1 and ac.is_del = 0
mapper.select: select id from member_level where level_name = #{levelName} and status = 0 limit 1
select max(card_no) from member where card_no like concat(#{deptPrefix}, '%') and char_length(card_no) = 11
mapper.insert: insert into member (card_no, name, phone, card_type_id, level_id, dept_id, valid_date, status, borrow_count_valid, current_points, remark, last_operator, source, sync_erp, created_at) values (#{cardNo}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{cardTypeId}, #{levelId}, #{deptId}, #{validDate}, #{status}, #{borrowCountValid}, #{currentPoints}, #{remark}, #{lastOperator}, #{source}, #{syncErp}, now())
mapper.update: update member set status = 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update member set card_type_id = #{cardTypeId}, valid_date = #{validDate}, status = #{status}, last_operator = #{lastOperator}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
